message:
docs: update test counts to 199 programs (12 formal, 5 CBMC harnesses)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 ### Test infrastructure
 
-198 tracked C test programs across 7 categories: unit (148), invariant (3), E2E (17),
-vignette (12), conformance (3), fuzz (4), and formal verification (11).

+vignette (12), conformance (3), fuzz (4), and formal verification (12).

 | **Cross-profile semantic parity gates** | All profiles produce identical semantic digests for shared fixture sets |
